purpose: AI-consumable structured templates for PIE Dashboard Draft Email feature. Consumed by /api/ai/chat draft_prospecting_email mode and /api/email/draft-to-outlook gateway endpoint.

excluded_from_v1_rotation.note: The following template categories from the source .docx are excluded from the AI rotation pool in v1. They require campaign-specific date adjustments and active marketing event coordination.
excluded_templates: E18 (Free Webinar: Navigating the Fraud Surge) — Available for manual override via Choose Different modal; not in auto-rotation.
Death/Taxes/Fraud webinar invites (Email #1, Email #2) — Date-locked to past event.
10 Compliance Mistakes webinar invites (Email #1-4) — Date-locked to past event.
NADA Fraud Factor webinar invite — Date-locked to past event.
excluded_from_v1_rotation.policy: When marketing has a new active webinar, add a new template entry with category=webinar and active_until date. AI will only select it during the active window.

tokens.{{Recipient.FirstName}}: Prospect contact first name from PIE (prospect.fn). If missing, fall back to 'there'.
tokens.{{{Sender.FirstName}}}: Rep first name from rep-performance.json (first word of rep.name).
tokens.{{{Sender.Calendar_Link__c}}}: Rep Microsoft Bookings URL from rep-performance.json rep.calendar_link field. If missing, AI substitutes natural language CTA: 'reply with a few times that work for you next week'.

ordering: Match prospect's known pain signal first (logged in dealer intel via PIE Mobile: high_credit_cost → credit_pricing | fraud_concern → fraud | compliance_audit_recent → compliance)
Then prospect ICP score profile (high_icp + multi_store → case_study; high_icp + single_store → total_solution)
Then OEM match (volume OEMs Honda/Toyota/Stellantis → speed; luxury → compliance/fraud)
Then dealer size (single store → focused product hook; multi-store group → case study or total solution)
Then template rotation (deprioritize templates rep has used in last 30 days)

templates.subject: Stop fraud in its tracks. Your dealership's new secret weapon.
templates.body:
Hi {{Recipient.FirstName}},

Fraud is surging at dealerships — 1 in 120 applications in the first half of 2025 included false data, and 5% of transactions were fraudulent.

That's why Informativ has a multi-layered approach to stopping:
• ID fraud
• Synthetic fraud
• Document fraud
• Internal fraud

Kia Moritz of Alliance knows the difference our tech makes first-hand. In just one year, our ID fraud tech flagged 30+ IDs for fraud, and "not one fraud made it through."

Read the full case study here: https://informativ.com/case-studies-and-testimonials/kia-moritz-of-alliance-prevents-fraud-builds-customer-trust-and-accelerates-deal-speed-with-informativs-total-solution/

Want to learn more? Here's my calendar link to select a time that's convenient for you: {{{Sender.Calendar_Link__c}}}

Best,
{{{Sender.FirstName}}}
templates.dealer_profile: Any dealer at risk for ID/synthetic fraud; data-led opening lands well with security-aware buyers
templates.primary_hook: Multi-layered fraud prevention

templates.subject: Compliance doesn't have to be a headache.
templates.body:
Hey {{Recipient.FirstName}},

Compliance: it's critical, but complicated.

Luckily, Informativ makes it easy for dealers to…
• Enforce the FTC Safeguards Rule, FCRA, and privacy laws with digital and mobile-friendly workflows that create a "forced march" for your team
• Eliminate paperwork and digitally collect buyer info on in-store and remote deals
• Store dead deals securely and stay audit-ready for the FTC-required 5 years

With Informativ, you cut your compliance burden up to 80%.

Download our free whitepaper to learn the Top 5 Compliance Violations Putting Your Dealership At Risk.

Interested in a quick call to see more? Select a time that's convenient for you to meet: {{{Sender.Calendar_Link__c}}}

Best,
{{{Sender.FirstName}}}
templates.dealer_profile: Multi-store groups with audit exposure; compliance-officer-aware buyers; dealers facing FTC Safeguards/FCRA scrutiny
templates.primary_hook: Cut compliance burden 80%

templates.subject: The best dealers know speed wins deals.
templates.body:
Hi {{Recipient.FirstName}},

Time kills deals — yet most dealers still run full credit apps after a test drive.

Imagine instead:
• Soft pull prequals (which don't ding a customer's credit) before the test drive so SmartPencil can help generate a faster, lender-accurate first pencil when a customer returns.

That's faster deals, less friction, and a smoother path from prequal to payment.

See it in action at Kia Moritz — "It's a great process — keeps you compliant and speeds up the process between the customer and the desk."

Read the full case study here: https://informativ.com/case-studies-and-testimonials/kia-moritz-of-alliance-prevents-fraud-builds-customer-trust-and-accelerates-deal-speed-with-informativs-total-solution/

I'd love to talk with you! Just choose a time that's convenient: {{{Sender.Calendar_Link__c}}}

Best,
{{{Sender.FirstName}}}

templates.subject: 20,000 pulls. 5x compliance risk. One simple fix.
templates.body:
Hi {{Recipient.FirstName}},

One large dealership group ran 20,000 hard pulls each month — but only sold 4,000 cars. That's 5x the compliance burden they needed.

By shifting to soft pulls on unsold deals, they reduced exposure from 20,000 to 4,000 hard pulls.

With Informativ, you can control costs and cut compliance risk — all while keeping sales moving.

Let's connect on how to optimize your credit pulls: {{{Sender.Calendar_Link__c}}}

Best,
{{{Sender.FirstName}}}
templates.dealer_profile: High-volume hard-pull-heavy dealers; Credit Guardrails / utilization governance buyers
templates.primary_hook: 20,000 pulls → 4,000 via soft-pull shift (Credit Guardrails framing)
templates.guardrail_note: References credit utilization. Frame as utilization governance / Credit Guardrails (per Combatting Low Margin Credit doc), NOT as price competition. The fix is structural, not transactional.

templates.subject: Audit-ready in 30 minutes (not hours)
templates.dealer_profile: Dealers post-audit or facing audit anxiety; short-form-preferred buyers
templates.primary_hook: 30-minute audit vs hours

deliverability_rules.minimum_personalization_requirement: AI must inject at least one dealer-specific sentence beyond token substitution (e.g., reference to dealer name, OEM, location, vehicle volume, or known dealer-intel data point from PIE Mobile activity log).
deliverability_rules.subject_line_modification: Use template subject line as-is unless prospect-specific context warrants a 3-7 word personalized prefix. AI is forbidden from generating subject lines from scratch — must use template subject as the base.
deliverability_rules.signature_handling: Do NOT inject a signature in the email body. Outlook auto-appends the rep's configured signature on send. Body ends with rep first name + line break only.

strategic_positioning_rules.canonical_framing: Structural cost control (Credit Guardrails) vs. transactional cost control (per-pull price negotiation). The Camping World bid response in the source doc is the canonical language template — reference it directly when prospect signals price shopping.
canonical_language_to_paraphrase: Every credit provider in the automotive space draws from the same bureau infrastructure. Our underlying data costs are the same. So, when you see significant price variation in competing bids, you're not looking at different data, you're looking at different margin philosophies.
Credit bureaus raise prices every year. Every provider receives the same increases and passes them through. That cycle repeats. A transactional approach to credit cost is a losing battle over time.

The only real way to control credit cost long term is utilization governance. Credit Guardrails is the only framework in the market designed to actively manage when and how credit is pulled — reducing unnecessary bureau usage while protecting compliance and stabilizing costs under a flat-rate model. That's structural cost control, not temporary pricing.
We are not built as a thin-margin credit reseller. We are built as a platform partner designed to manage cost, reduce risk, and grow with you.

If the goal is the lowest number today, there will always be a thinner option than Informativ. If the goal is sustainable cost control and a platform built for long-term performance, that's where we differentiate.
Dealers who trust us aren't with us because we're the cheapest. They're with us because we protect every deal and they make more money doing it.
hard_rules: NEVER lead with credit price competition. Bureau data costs are fixed and standardized across all providers — competing on the data-cost line is a losing game.

ALWAYS frame Informativ as an innovator, not an aggregator. We build, own, and extend the platform (SmartPencil is the latest proof). Aggregators stitch third-party tools and inherit their integration debt.

When a prospect signals credit-price shopping (RFP, Strategic Source involvement, head-to-head per-pull rate comparison), DO NOT use price-competitive language. Pivot to Credit Guardrails for utilization governance — the framework for STRUCTURAL cost control, not transactional cost control.

Credit Guardrails is a named, proprietary framework. Use the name. It is the ONLY framework in the market designed to actively manage when and how credit is pulled — reducing unnecessary bureau usage while protecting compliance and stabilizing costs under a flat-rate model.

If the prospect's primary buying motivation is lowest-bureau-price, acknowledge upfront we are not the lowest price option. Be willing to disqualify: 'If you are just looking for a credit bid, we would not want to burn up any more of your time.' Walk away from price-only deals — chasing them is a losing battle.
Frame Informativ as a platform partner, not a credit reseller. Cost control comes from utilization governance, not bureau price negotiation.
approved_value_anchors: Total Solution platform (credit + compliance + fraud + SmartPencil + Customer Insights)
Credit Guardrails — utilization governance to control credit cost long-term
SmartPencil pre-deal credit and deal structuring (proprietary)
Multi-layered fraud detection (ID, synthetic, document, internal)
Cut compliance burden up to 80% / Audit-ready in 30 minutes
30% lead conversion lift via Customer Insights QR codes
